_schema.purpose: Per-NPC F5-TTS reference voice picks, sourced from Kokoro v1.0 speakers. Combines the descriptive profile (gender, age, accent hint) with what the engine can actually produce. References live in tools/prerender/references/<name>.wav + .txt.

fidelity_levels.strong: Kokoro has a speaker in the right language family — accent transfers authentically through F5
fidelity_levels.workable: Kokoro has a related speaker — accent flavor is present but not canonical
fidelity_levels.placeholder: No direct match — using closest English baseline; flagged for external reference sourcing

gaps_filled.Scottish: Piper en_GB-alba-medium (Elias McIntire) — works because Alba is English-language, Scottish-accented

gaps_open.Russian: Keril + Mikhail Kolyatov — need Russian-accented ENGLISH (not Russian-language). Candidates: Mozilla Common Voice `accent='Russian'` samples, L2-ARCTIC is missing Russian but has adjacent Slavic options, or ElevenLabs paid voices tagged Russian.
gaps_open.German: Sergio Weisartz — need German-accented ENGLISH. Same sources.
gaps_open._note: Piper voices tagged ru_RU / de_DE / sv_SE were wrongly assumed to speak English with accent; in reality they're single-language trained and produce unintelligible output when fed English text. Reverted these to English-native placeholders on 2026-04-18.

_schema.lessons_learned: Automated scoring (F0 rise, loudness, duration) cannot detect phonetic unintelligibility — a Piper voice happily produces correct F0 contours while saying nonsense words. Always audibly verify new reference voices before locking them into the mapping.

assignments.name: captain_m1
assignments.notes: am_fenrir — rugged American explorer. Default preset for male commanders.

assignments.name: captain_f1
assignments.notes: af_alloy — calm teacher. Default preset for female commanders.

assignments.name: _generic_crew
assignments.notes: Random crew members offering their services. Friendly young American female.

assignments.name: ECHO
assignments.notes: af_aoede, Kokoro-direct. User rejected F5-cloned bf_emma in v1.0.0 for cloning fragments on repeated listening; aoede is smoother and fatigue-resistant.

assignments.name: Creed
assignments.notes: Deep authoritative; Hindi M provides gravitas

assignments.name: Virgil
assignments.notes: British rogue — need to generate ref from bm_fable

assignments.name: Unknown Contact
assignments.notes: British RP mysterious villain; low pitch at play time

assignments.name: Arle
assignments.notes: Female commander — Hindi F gives commanding non-Western flavor fitting Luminate Commander role

assignments.name: Keril
assignments.notes: Kolyatov Conscript — ACCENT GAP: Piper ru_RU is Russian-language-only and produces unintelligible English. Using generic American M until we source Russian-accented English audio (Common Voice / L2-ARCTIC / ElevenLabs).

assignments.name: Thundo Klipz
assignments.notes: American gritty salvager — need to add am_eric probe

assignments.name: Adeline Lorentz
assignments.notes: British station commander (same voice fam as ECHO; different pitch should distinguish)

assignments.name: Claude

assignments.name: Elias McIntire
assignments.notes: Piper en_GB-alba-medium — 'Alba' = Scottish Gaelic for Scotland. Authentic Scottish accent

assignments.name: Olga Skarsgard
assignments.notes: ACCENT GAP: Piper sv_SE is Swedish-language-only. Using crisp British F (clipped military tone fits the Combat Veteran role) until we source Swedish-accented English.

assignments.name: Edar Thopter

assignments.name: Sergio Weisartz
assignments.notes: ACCENT GAP: Piper de_DE is German-language-only and catastrophically unintelligible in English. Using lively American M (captures the 'quirky doctor' energy, loses the German accent) until we source German-accented English.

assignments.notes: Mature American HR officer — need af_nicole probe

assignments.name: Mikhail Kolyatov
assignments.notes: ACCENT GAP: Piper ru_RU is Russian-language-only. Using deep American M for cold-commissar feel until we source Russian-accented English.

assignments.name: Triane Solis
assignments.notes: Mystical Luminate admin — Hindi F fits spiritual/pan-Asian aesthetic perfectly
